title: Dendrophorbium silvani
taxonomy: Dendrophorbium silvani is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, and is further categorized as a member of the tribe Eupatorieae. This plant is a part of the genus Dendrophorbium, which is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The family Asteraceae, to which Dendrophorbium silvani belongs, is commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The genus Dendrophorbium is closely related to the genus Eupatorium, and shares many similarities with it. The tribe Eupatorieae, to which Dendrophorbium silvani belongs, is a large and diverse group of plants found in tropical and subtropical regions.
